description: Storage governor triage: heavy pool admission, per-pool/per-category backlog & fairness, worker health, and governor/Redis config.

panels.description: Heavy in-flight jobs currently admitted (SCARD of governor:heavy_running).
panels.title: Heavy running

panels.description: Effective heavy admission cap (max_heavy). AT-CAP when heavy_running >= heavy_cap.
panels.title: Heavy cap

panels.description: RQ broker (Redis) reachability. 0 = DOWN.
panels.title: Redis

panels.description: Live storage workers (sum of worker_up). 0 = no storage workers.
panels.title: Workers up

panels.description: Total queued backlog across every pool/category/tier lane.
panels.title: Total backlog

panels.description: Age of the governor snapshot (time - generated_at). Red past the freshness bound = stale-but-answering.
panels.title: Data age

panels.description: Last exporter scrape self-health. 0 = exporter blind / apiv4 down (all-zeros masquerading as healthy).
panels.title: Scrape

panels.description: Scan-cap honesty: truncated_lanes + truncated_inflight. >0 means the snapshot is partial.
panels.title: Truncation

panels.description: Queued backlog per lane (pool/category/tier). Reserved tiers (interactive/standard) carry the _pool sentinel category.
panels.title: Backlog by lane

panels.description: FIFO-head oldest queued age per lane. Per-tier SLA: interactive 300s, standard 900s, template 3600s, bulk 3600s, maintenance 21600s, reclaim best-effort (lowest priority).
panels.title: Oldest queued age by lane

panels.description: Fair-tier per-category inflight vs its cap (governed heavy tiers: template/bulk/maintenance/reclaim). Reserved tiers have no per-tenant inflight.
panels.title: Fairness: inflight vs cap (fair tiers)

panels.description: Failed-registry count per lane and started-jobs-past-timeout. FailedSpike uses clamp_min(increase(...),0) so auto-delete shrink never fires.
panels.title: Failed & stuck-started by lane

panels.description: Per-category fairness snapshot: inflight, cap, weight, leaked SCARD delta, starved & at-cap flags. Fair tiers only.
panels.title: Per-category fairness

panels.description: Stranded lanes: backlog present but no live consumer (only emitted when coverage is known).
panels.title: Stranded lanes

panels.description: Per-worker health: alive flag, heartbeat age, PSI CPU/IO and deferring flag. Dead = up==0 or heartbeat_age > 420s.
panels.title: Workers

panels.description: Worker heartbeat age over time. Red past 420s = dead worker (may still hold slots until reconcile).
panels.title: Worker heartbeat age

panels.description: Per-worker PSI CPU/IO vs the governor psi_limit. Deferring-by-design when PSI > limit.
panels.title: Worker PSI vs limit

panels.description: PSI pressure limit above which the governor defers admission.
panels.title: PSI limit

panels.description: Governor kill-switch. 0 = gating disabled (admission unbounded).
panels.title: Gating

panels.description: Redis governor:config mirrored vs DB. 0 = mirror drift (env-fallback in effect).
panels.title: Config mirror

panels.description: Worker-reported multitenancy mode. ABSENT when unknown (shown as unknown) - do not read absence as flat.
panels.title: Multitenancy

panels.description: Global heavy leaked-counter delta (SCARD minus live). Sustained >0 = leaked in-flight; self-heals at next boot/at-cap reconcile.
panels.title: Heavy leak

panels.description: RQ Redis PING latency.
panels.title: Redis ping

panels.description: Redis used_memory / maxmemory. >0.9 = near maxmemory (evictions silently corrupt SCARD gauges).
panels.title: Redis mem ratio

panels.description: Redis evicted_keys (cumulative). Any increase over the window means keys are being evicted.
panels.title: Redis evictions (15m)

title: IsardVDI Storage Governor
